enunciado:
Given an integer array 
nums
 of 
unique
 elements, return 
all possible
 
subsets
 
(the power set)
.


The solution set 
must not
 contain duplicate subsets. Return the solution in 
any order
.


 


Example 1:




Input:
 nums = [1,2,3]

Output:
 [[],[1],[2],[1,2],[3],[1,3],[2,3],[1,2,3]]



Example 2:




Input:
 nums = [0]

Output:
 [[],[0]]



 


Constraints:




1 <= nums.length <= 10


-10 <= nums[i] <= 10


All the numbers of 
nums
 are 
unique
.
